nodes.name: Asana Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggers when tasks are created or updated in Asana

nodes.name: Get All Project Tasks
nodes.notes: Fetches all tasks from the project to analyze context

nodes.name: Prepare Task Context
nodes.notes: Prepares task data and calculates team workload metrics

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert project manager assistant. Analyze the provided tasks and assign priority scores (1-100) based on:

1. DEADLINE URGENCY (40% weight):
   - Overdue tasks: 90-100 priority
   - Due within 24 hours: 80-89
   - Due within 3 days: 70-79
   - Due within 1 week: 60-69
   - Due within 2 weeks: 50-59
   - Beyond 2 weeks: 30-49
   - No due date: 40

2. DEPENDENCIES (30% weight):
   - Blocking other tasks (dependents): +20 priority boost
   - Has many incomplete subtasks: +10 boost
   - Blocked by other tasks (dependencies): -15 penalty
   - No dependencies: neutral

3. TEAM WORKLOAD (30% weight):
   - Assignee has >10 active tasks: -15 priority
   - Assignee has 5-10 tasks: -5 priority
   - Assignee has <5 tasks: +10 priority
   - Unassigned: +5 priority (needs attention)

Provide detailed reasoning for each task's priority score and classify as Critical (80-100), High (60-79), Medium (40-59), or Low (0-39).

nodes.name: AI Task Prioritizer
nodes.notes: AI Agent powered by GPT-4 to prioritize tasks

parameters.jsCode:
const prioritizedTasks = $input.first().json.prioritized_tasks;
return prioritizedTasks.map(task => ({ json: task }));

nodes.name: Extract Prioritized Tasks
nodes.notes: Converts array to individual items for looping

nodes.name: Update Task Priority
nodes.notes: Updates task with priority information in notes field

nodes.name: Add Priority Tag
nodes.notes: Adds priority level as a tag
